events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a missing bonding jumper around a water meter in an industrial electrical equipment bonding scope. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal water piping systems, and specifically requires bonding jumpers around equipment that may need removal (like water meters) to ensure electrical continuity. This is a clear non-compliance.
